code: import React from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const statusStyles={draft:'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700',sent:'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700',paid:'bg-green-100 text-green-700',partially_paid:'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700',overdue:'bg-red-100 text-red-700'};const labels={draft:'Draft',sent:'Sent',paid:'Paid',partially_paid:'Partial',overdue:'Overdue'};export function StatusBadge(_ref){let{status}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:`px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold ${statusStyles[status]}`,children:labels[status]});}
